# ona_runner_scm_integration (Resource)

Manages an SCM integration on a Gitpod runner.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ona_runner_scm_integration" "github" {
  runner_id                     = ona_runner.example.id
  scm_id                        = "github"
  host                          = "github.com"
  oauth_client_id               = var.github_oauth_client_id
  oauth_plaintext_client_secret = var.github_oauth_client_secret
  pat                           = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) SCM host (e.g. `github.com`).
- `runner_id` (String) Runner ID this integration belongs to.
- `scm_id` (String) SCM identifier from the runner's configuration schema (e.g. `github`, `gitlab`).

### Optional

- `issuer_url` (String) Override authentication provider URL if it differs from the SCM host.
- `oauth_client_id` (String) OAuth app client ID.
- `oauth_plaintext_client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth app client secret in plaintext. Encrypted by the runner before storage. Not returned by the API.
- `pat` (Boolean) Whether Personal Access Token authentication is enabled.
- `virtual_directory` (String) Virtual directory path for Azure DevOps Server (e.g. `/tfs`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) SCM integration ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ona_runner_scm_integration.github <scm-integration-id>
```
